sentences.quote: The agent works through eight finding classes in strict order, one class at a time, against eleven readiness gates: (1)~CitationIntegrity --- every \texttt{\textbackslash bibitem} is fetched against arXiv or DOI and compared character-for-character; (2)~ParameterProvenance --- every numerical parameter is checked against \texttt{PARAMETER\_PROVENANCE}; (3)~LeanProofSubstance --- every cited Lean theorem is read at its declaration site and its proof body inspected for placeholder patterns; (4)~CrossPaperConsistency --- the paper is diff'd against every other paper for shared constructs; (5)~NarrativeGrounding --- first-claims, unification claims, attribution claims, feasibility claims, and simulation-evidence claims are scanned against the artifact; (6)~AssumptionDisclosure --- every cited theorem's load-bearing hypotheses must appear in prose; (7)~CountFreshness --- count literals must match the canonical \texttt{counts.tex} macros; (8)~ProductionRunHealth --- numerical-evidence claims must trace to a successful \texttt{ProductionRun} graph node.
